Bin There Dump That","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Diane Myrden","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKJPXgTO6Msdh6kQRiDf_mbZVNmgxDMV68ZWYK_RNSiSztTUw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Caleb and his team were very professional. Came, did the work and cleaned up, like they were never there, except I had a lovely new roof. His rates are competitive and I would highly recommend them to anyone needing their roof replaced. Thanks guys!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"T. Lowry","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWrY2zrOrJVpvr2a8RqoQl3f6b_-eog0tFLter_EmuegaTeEq8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I used BARK to find some quotes when my insurance company's recommended roofer was out to lunch on his quote for a 4/12 roof and for a cruddy shingle brand.  ALWAYS research the brand of shingles and know your roof pitch, it makes life easier for busy roofers. To me, finding a roofer is about the people and about supporting the smaller companies. When Caleb came to see the house and I told him what I knew; that this roof needed 3/8 plywood over ship lap, and there was a wee leak, he checked and confirmed.  He told me the product he would use (Malarkey) and I had already researched it and I shook his hand on the spot. No Cash in advance!  It's January so he watched the weather, and told me exactly when they would be here!  Perfect timing! As they went along on the project they shared what they were doing when I asked and I carefully watched everything unfold.  Shingles and vents off, ice barrier and protection all the way to the peak, drip edge all around, proper starter shingles for the Malarkey system, new vents (they even enlarged the holes) removed and cleaned up a mess from an old furnace stack that someone was too lazy to deal with, climbed in my attic twice to make sure things were secure.  Cleanup was perfect. It took about 2 days! I am very proud to have Malarkey Vista AC Shingles on my roof installed by Caleb the owner of Cornerstone Exterior(s) and his very kind crew.  Great job Gentlemen and no...you "will not be back", and for that I am grateful and when I sell this home in the next 2 years, I can transfer the warranty to the new owner.  If anyone complains about this man and his company...they are ignorant.  Thanks again, Caleb et al, because having this done properly, well, it means more than you know.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bonnie W","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWq-DEUzcx50_ntyW5pTgA_a1b_e8XaaBAlTaLp3_I2C5T2xvg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had our roof done by Cornerstone Exterior last week. The crew did an excellent job, and the roof looks really good. We have a very steep roof and I was amazed at how hard Caleb and his crew worked in the hot weather and how quickly they did a high quality job. The new shingles and flashing look really nice.
I have no hesitation in recommending Cornerstone for a quality job at a reasonable price, completed by a company with courtesy and integrity.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tricia Datené","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWUfgAxL2otArxJ50lwFrCnC6d3MnaKzU6NIwLDv_cKqNCPbFs4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I had a leak in my garage roof and I sent a message to them on Jan but did not get a response until Jan 7.  They told me on two separate days that they would come to do a quote and both days did not show up.  On Jan 9 I emailed them and asked if they were still able to come.  On Jan 10 they emailed me to ask if they could come within an hour.  I asked if they could give me 90 minutes as I was just getting into the shower.  They pushed for an earlier time and by then I was out of the shower and agreed.  When they finally came they looked at my garage and told me they did not do flat roofs.  Why could they not have told me that earlier!  I wasted a week waiting for them.  This is not very good customer service.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Margaret Scott","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL5G-ELqe06Ssy-v4Ihi7hG_PVw-3BZWFBAEovsFArZj445Zw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I highly recommend Cornerstone Exterior. Their quote was the most competitive of the three I received and included a superior warranty, thanks to their use of high-quality shingles. Caleb and his team were punctual, courteous, and professional throughout. They completed the job efficiently and ensured the site was thoroughly cleaned, leaving no trace behind—except for my new, great-looking roof.","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: Golden Rule Roofing
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Lise Wessels","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJYc40rmMPcqXdeUVX_dyJF1zAX3KIhlLYO13eBI5uyzfM6dA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Avoid this company, they are fraudulent! I had a leak and they came out to look at it. The man said he was the owner. When he was here he said he could fix it for me, but I need an entire new roof. He "proved it" by showing me where shingles were lifting.  I had only just moved in and had the building inspected including the roof and the inspection went very well. I then got a second opinion and that too said the roof looked good.

After hearing Golden Rule told me I needed a new roof, the inspector brought his roofer out to have a look. His roofer indicated that the roof had at least another 7-10 years in it, and also showed me evidence of force used where the shingles were lifting. It appeared someone had very recently forced the shingles up.

Golden Rule took an emergency and used it to try to fraud me out of an entire new roof.  They damaged my property to try to "prove it". DO NOT use this company, they are not at all trustworthy.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Emily Sortome","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKMZiNAdxGiJKpHGgKohVm2MgTBk2-Fzp808zR-csGGk0fa5g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Brendan was very helpful and fast with his assessment of our roof. He worked with us to come up with a solution for our leaking roof that would help us get a little bit longer out of it. He has been very professional and responsive in communicating with us.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"emili johnson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKodLXzMyaZBsZJdq6M3AXwF-iKt1UF0nl7ta6ZmkkArtETpuQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Called golden rule to assist with adding flashing around my chimney and redo our skylight to correct issues found on our home inspection report, and instead of giving us an estimate for the requested work they said our shingles were coming off and that there were leaks everywhere and that they needed to do a full roof replacement on a 12 year old roof. I   Called in a restoration company to check out attic for leaks or signs of water damage, and they found no evidence of issues with our shingles or roof other than what was noted on the inspection report. I called in a third roofing company just to be sure, and they also found no issues with our roof and said it has atleast 10 years of life left in it. The amount of panic and trouble that was caused by the is company trying to scam us for a $26k plus roof replacement was beyond measure. They also refused to work with our home insurance company which was the biggest red flag, and I will be filing a report with the BBB. Do not trust these guys!!!!!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Reece Halvorsen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWiBl9vchpXfqeV4bXmZNu_0BT-IJ4ZcjatUb-2l-3PapD48ic=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Brendan and his team did an absolutely incredible job. Their attention to detail, and ability to fix problems on the go is second to non.
Our roof was leaking as the previous roofer did not install anything properly. This caused water to seep through the decking, and caused further damage and rot to the trusses.
Once Brendan and his team tore the old roof off, we discovered how bad the situation was.
His team was able to fix Everything. They completely cleaned the attic space, replaced the rotten trusses, and did a great install. They used premium materials and their care about doing a perfect job shows.
They left no mess, and provided my family with a solid roof. Thank you for everything!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shirley Myhr","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKhyJD_m7Wh2ca7goknFSkypYPdgIKf3aj6H9kVjYxDQbDArg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We used Brendan for our previous house and for our new house purchase. Both were full roof replacement.  We would absolutely use him again. Very personable, professional, and honest. His team did a great job. He is always available for any questions you may have. Thanks  Brendan!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"C. Hajer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIIsUrrS5bg2CkrKtdYNzXfUFl1EMWE4HRMqMbN33KZrHsG7w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Of 5 or so local roofing companies, Brendan was the only one to call us back regarding a roof leak.  We are so glad he did as we were thoroughly impressed with his professionalism and skill. He and his team did a great job fixing our roof (and matching the old shingles to the new). He kept in contact during some short delays due to weather, and was here on the first rain-free day.  We are also happy that they try to be as eco-friendly as possible. We would definitely recommend Golden Rule Roofing!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Miriam Mcleod","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ0VXKaIn95ubl49-SuberCu1db9vTfzA_KDxPqeM5-lswxNA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Brendan and his team originally replaced our roof 10 years ago. (They did a great job then as well) We had a leak start and Brendan came very quickly. Although the leak had nothing to do with his work, he and his crew still took care of it. They are efficient, knowledgeable and treat their customers very well. I will always use this company for my roofing needs. The quality and value they put in to thier service cannot be beat!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jesse Harvey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJyLuDYvJCoXLO7H6GPurzm2P-o4mwSc95DotTZdLhz9vxFmw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow I'm not sure what these negative reviews are about. The Brendan I know goes above and beyond for his customers. I have had a roof done at my business 2 years ago, because I came in the morning and my roof was leaking all over my stock. I called Brenden up, and he was on the roof in about an hour, stopped the leak temporarily, and literally had my roof completely redone the NEXT day. I seriously couldn't have been happier with his speedy, and amazing service. Oh and I asked if I could get black flashing instead of the white stuff and it was no problem at all, he also didn't charge me anymore after changing my mind. In my opinion, they have the best customer service I have come across in the local roofing market. Nothing but a great experience. 5 stars all day long. I really doubt these other guys whom have written the bad reviews could produce an invoice to prove that they actually dealt with Brenden. I will be also using him to do my roof at home in the spring next year.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Paul had the materials delivered to our address and his team showed up as promised and went to work very competently to finish the job within a reasonable timeframe. I was worried about job safety due to the steep pitch of our roof but the team applied all safety practices effectively and worked carefully and safely throughout the entire project while they were polite and respectful of ourselves and our neighbors. Throughout the job and upon job completion Paul’s team kept the worksite clean and organized.

It has now been almost 4 years and we have not had any leaks or problems with our new roof and it still looks great! I since have had a couple of questions about roof maintenance and Paul again has been very responsive to immediately pick up the phone and help. title: Valley roofing and exteriors
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Sherry B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWixPQbMLR_MFDlLXpRZkR9d7HTX0Iw_pIcce917cnlE2jKH0A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We had this company come out to repair a leak which had water coming into a room in the lower floor of the house. We were told it was coming from around the chimney area. Dave have paid the $200 cash, as they guaranteed their work. A caulking or sealant was put on the chimney area. We were told if this did not fix the issue, to call back and they would come back and resolve it right away.

Dave called numerous times for weeks and his calls went unanswered with NO REPLY!  I then called and my call was answered right away. He told me that he was "away". I passed the phone to Dave and they spoke and he told us that he would come the following day, and he did not show up, nor did he even call us back at all! No call to say He could not make it,  or rebook, nothing!

WE explained that the leak was likely coming from the DECK! I knew this all along!

Why no follow up call? Why did he not show up when he said he would? Why did he ignore all our calls? Why did he not respond to messages?  We were very polite and just needed our leak fixed. Why would a reputable business not answer their phone, and not treat their customers with respect.

When a company guarantees a job they do and does not follow through, thats not good business! When the owner of this company calls that customer only because he saw he got an honest review from that customer out of anger, bad business. Then this company go on to yell and theaten the customer, and blow his phone with nasty texts? ........thats beyond bad business!

If you had followed through, shown up when you said you would, or at the very least called us back , that would have made things better.

We ask that you please STOP texting us.

Thank you.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"J M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL04JRzbUupU8-WWDnLR6_VC5NPQPvxOj44M1NTx2rux0VTLA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"2 stars because they were available to do the job right away. if i had to wait the traditional amount of time i would have given 1 star. Work and business ethic is very little to compare to a professional group. Had to hire someone else to fix the job, as owner was not interested in resolution.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kat Andison","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUx1o_wj6PejlDMSHk-S7AH0l1_VOR7gkq6yDcz4GO8W5qWX_09=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a leak in a metal roof a few days before Christmas... this company was the most reasonable quote and were able to come quickly to help us out... because it was getting dark they fixed the problem...no more leak...but they had to come another day to make it look good...its all done and you would never know it was patched...thanks Andrew.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Last week we had a leak in one of our out buildings and called Kevin. He came the next day and fixed the leak, which was the result of a popped screw. AND, he didn't charge a thing!
We are so impressed with Kevin and his team and will definitely be hiring them again when we undergo planned renovations.
Thank you Kevin!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Don Osborne","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJryDeBFO0phg-clj96LIIruF_X4yoshqKywq-3_5TaBZOYVQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a small roof leak and had a local roofing company come in and repair the leak. We were provided the “fear” tactics that the roof needed immediate replacement or we would incur major mould damage.  After contacting 6 roofing companies in the Cowichan Valley area, only 2 responded with quotes for a new roof.  Kevin of Cowichan Valley Roofing insisted meeting at the house where he did a complete inspection and noted that the roof did not need immediate replacement but was on the “edge” of needing replacement and that it could last another 2-3 years. He clearly explained what caused the leak (poor air vent installation), what would be replaced if his team installed a new roof as well as answering all of our questions regarding best shingles, colours, flashing etc.

Once we decided to move forward, he provided a detailed quote and a date as to when the new roof could be installed.  His well-experienced team completed the roof based on his estimates providing a professionally installed roof.  In terms of customer service, managing expectations and professional / honest service, Cowichan Valley Roofing is definitely recommended.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Susan Wilson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKtzLlC60OrCTirI6mp2jUdo0BVvegILrIaVtNY6jgAFAkI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently had Cowichan Valley roofing come over and repair a plumbing vent on my roof. This is the second time I have dealt with them.   Worth it to call them!
Awesome company!  Honest business people.   I called them because I had a problem with what I thought was a roof leak.   Kevin inspected the roof to discover the chimney was the problem.   He even recommended someone to fix my chimney.   Didn't charge me anything!  I would highly recommend them This was in 2021","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Bonnie Perkins","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWittx_BQ_b5czv4vitkMW6PCWGr4BDc-cwZZ_ZKx9XWJdzBBA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I employed Bath Fitters to install a new surround Tub/Shower but when the drywall was tested for asbestos it came up positive. Therefore, HazForce  were enlisted to cut out the drywall and prevent contamination. They did an amazing job, not only cutting out and disposing of the dangerous drywall, but also checking for dry rot, black mold and/ or any other offending substance that would interfere with the safety of out bathroom area., plus spraying anti mold and bacteria liquid. Their cleanup of the area was extraordinarily  thorough, leaving it looking better than it has looked in years! I felt very confident that the new tub/shower was being installed into a very safe area. Thank you!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Morticia Mac","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXxbncMqosacmrYeBS9il04uZYki8y5hvAUoGdcQVu_VaIagD8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We would like to leave positive review for Hazforce Environmental Ltd.
Our 85 yr old home had vermiculite insulation in the attic with a high possibility of containing asbestos, old pink fibreglass, a small drywalled room that was built to house a grow-op.  The attic was also home to a small number of bats.

A comprehensive home assessment was done for vermiculite and mold abatement by a knowledgeable representative who took the time to explain the job step by step and clarify anything we didn’t understand to our satisfaction. The estimate was clearly written and itemized,  making it easy to refer to for costs of the job descriptions.  Everything was taken care of from hazardous material removal, 3rd party air quality testing, reinstallation of new R40 cellulose insulation, and finally certificates of proof should we sell our home in the future.

Hazforce crew were professional and friendly with good work standards,  they always arrived on time.  We were kept updated with photo’s as the job progressed.  Their crew foreman was on site daily to manage anything that came up.    Our bat issue was remediated according to B.C. conservation laws, evicted alive and well and attic vents protected so they could not return.  Grow-op room studs and drywall were deconstructed and removed,  the area completely cleaned up.

No problems communicating with this company, available 24/7 for any issues.
Hazforce will go above and beyond to work with clients and their special needs.
We would have no hesitation in using Hazforce again or referring them to others!
Thank you Roger Lessard, Jon and Mike Sperber and the Hazforce crew for a job well done.
John & Trisha Waddington
Youbou B.C.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICCv47e-QE&fid=0x0:0xd91e0535c8e8a8c"],"When":"2020-9-9"},{"Name":"Maureen Davidson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7F0zUVm6TYjvVAlYRpeV7C-wYwiyE2LKi5y18OKQ2iC6FzQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I called HazForce and spoke with Jon and he came to our house that same afternoon.  He was very knowledgeable and professional about our issue and put us at easy right away.  Jon spoke with our contractor and met with him at our home the next day to talk to him about our issues.  Jon was able to fit us in his work schedule and a crew came out the next week.  They did an excellent job.  They completed it when they said they would, there was no hidden charges and everything was tidied up when they left.  Jon then went the extra mile and called that same evening to make sure we were satisfied with the job.  Would highly recommend HazForce.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Keith Webb","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJiq7rT-V6e3UX0TVDC1YwN34V5uM40UV85xBzvsPN4tOT49g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The team from HazForce were the lead in our 80 year old home bathroom renovation. They removed the lathe and plaster containing asbestos and lead in a very safe and careful manner. They arrived on time even in a snow storm and worked very long days to complete on time as promised. Very professional service!  All air testing was done and we had clearance to get on with or renovation the next day. Jon went out of his way to replace lost hinges from the door and made our experience with remediation as painless as possible. Well done!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Steve Lawrence","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK7Wite7nk58B5n1SeSIrqv7KnSxlLtOkPPNVvYJTDgIcbmltc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I'm a professional project manager with high standards. I found Jon and his team excellent to work with and am currently doing a second project with them. They provided a thorough and professional hazardous materials abatement service,. They were on time and within budget. All staff were a pleasure to work with, communicated well and paid attention to the details. I recommend them wholeheartedly.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Yancy Sparrow","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKIKmxWdibLYHEhJPMw7jAaR20AA2WCI6BT_tbMBhZhoXGZIg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had Hazforce come in and do some abatement on our property. Jon and his team were very professional and informative. He was great at explaining the process and the degrees of risk involved in the work to be done.

The work was done in a timely and efficient manner and the place was left very clean after they had left.

Thank you Hazforce for your great work","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Roberta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLWf6uG55MNWNJd2PDbLwkjHusLEYLX3jCIZohVXeRN51ks5A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jon at HazForce came and assessed the staining on the inside of attic from a moisture problem that had been rectified a year before, Hazforce employees came and eliminated the staining, on time, good price, professional service.  A mishap occurred causing slight damage to the drywall on the ceiling below the attic.  Mike came and assessed the problem, a drywall repairman was sent  instantly and you would never notice it has ever happened.  Great integrity.   I am grateful my neighbour recommended HazForce to me, and I will be calling them for future needs.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Matthias Scott","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWje9dNdGrhNpWafZBxjbgh5WPwj4akal14CEgwlZ1RQMBhlp8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We hired Hazforce for a small drywall removal job as part of a bathroom renovation, and I found the experience to be very positive. Right from the beginning they were professional, thorough, and accommodating. They worked around our schedule and were easy to keep in contact with whenever I had an inquiry regarding the job to be done. I would highly recommend Hazforce for anyone looking for a similar service","Images":null,"When":""}]

After emailing back and forth they told us we will no longer service your unit and to find another company. Never have I been so disappointed in a company in my life. They took our money and gave us literally nothing for it.. use Westisle for 1000% better service and half the price! :) and will actually provide the service your in need of!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Scott Ferron- old account","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXV4aCsmg5BshoD-G43Nj7IRi4kY8mJLpuWYw4n70TnQ7x2Vn1v_w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Update 3, after several days of back and forth, all repairs are finally complete and paperwork also in my hands so i can finalize the rebates. Ended up with a 2000.00 discount for the gas leak and shoddy initial installation. Personally I would recommend micro managing the office staff as their communication is poor. The installer and salesperson do not speak to each other, so ensure you read the work order fully.

Update 2, a second set of trucks came by and upgraded my gas line to code. A 2 day install took 3 weeks to complete.  I still have not received a final bill, and I was offered a $500 discount for a gas leak that lasted 20 hours before I caught it. I am into week 4 now, so let's see how much longer this takes.

Update, a week later the Super Plumbers came back and re did a lot of the work. 2 more trucks, 4 contractors and another day down yet still not completed. There will be yet another visit to replace the gas line.

I have to admit, this was a very poorly planned installation. I ordered a complete set up, new furnace, air conditioner, and on demand hot water tank. $30,000.00 The job was planned for 60 days prior to installation date. More than enough time to order, and have ready, everything you could need for the installation.
When the contractors arrived, 3 trucks, and 6 service personnel worked away for 1 day installing everything on the furnace and part of the AC system. On the second day, the AC system was installed, however the contractor who was supposed to install the hot water on demand had another job to do, so it was a second night without hot water, but i understand, emergencies happen. When i checked the install the following morning, the pipe leading out of the chimney cap was not sealed with anything and just left open to the air.
On day 3, the on demand hot water contractor showed up, and  then left for 3 hours to "get parts" showing back up at noon and working away until 6pm that night. He even had to call and ask another person to help him finish off the job.
The following morning, My tenant told me that there was a strong gas smell in the basement and there was water on the floor next to the furnace. My mother who also lives downstairs, also told me she felt sick and sleepy. I received this call at 9am, after everyone had showered and gotten ready for the day. I left work and came home to a sickly smell and water on the floor as described, and proceeded to shut the units off at the meter and try and trace the gas leaks. The fittings were not tight enough and a gas line union was also not sealed well enough with Teflon Gas tape. I managed to find the water leak, which turned out to be a pipe not seated into the sump pump housing, just placed on top which spilled over when the furnace drained the condensate. Finally on the roof, the exhaust pipes were run long and left 28 inches above the top of my chimney with a small piece of sheet metal placed on top with sealant that did not stick to the metal, allowing rain water to come inside my house.
Another different contractor showed up and managed to trace the gas leak, repair the water pipe and clean up some of the wiring just left hanging.
The job is still not complete, missing a grill cover for the hole in my cold air return, a plug for the chimney, and a roof cap to protect the exhaust pipes and hopefully that will at least be fastened into the bricks so the wind doesn't rip it off the house.
Sadly, I DO NOT recommend this service. Unsafe.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDB7uGKgAE&fid=0x0:0xd4258d9ec5d73925"],"When":"2023-1-20"},{"Name":"Bruce Hendon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJPBjwXV6mm905d_kK3PaojNrXrmvcurhRim8IE2rqHhxYB3w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I can't comment on the quality of work. I called them to do some duct work they took all my information was given a 4 hour window time to look at job, received a email day prior to scheduled day. Nobody showed, no email, no phone call. Called the office to ask what was going on, was told a manager was going to call me back after being put on a expediated list. NO CALLBACK. I wasted a lot of time waiting. My thought is if the managers are this negligent prior to job - this type of careless work culture and effort transfers down to all the employees","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"James Drew","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK1kqkIMGQZVGj-sJLHIyYNnWTSjxoJ7jseGKXjsYFmhW3kyw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This company is a joke. Didnt bring any supplies or even aware he was supposed to hook it up. No communicatuin between there dispatch and workers he said  will not be calling them ever again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marg Corbett","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLfde9nN296O813oj20kE5KIbOeuRH_HSa2e2UfRVk9fmLlwA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I would like to say that Sean, Erroll, John and Coleton all provided 5* service the past 2 days while they installed a new ducted Heat Pump system into my home. I would gladly recommend this company and their workmanship to others. Thanks for a job well done.
Margaret Corbett","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICRkpr5Sw&fid=0x0:0xd4258d9ec5d73925"],"When":"2023-3-29"},{"Name":"Cheryl Bentley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocICufIvtR93eh3rJrp5TJLzSwc-SjZxXCblRuoM_mUvU8UujQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We had a new heat pump installed in our home and with it came a “satisfaction guarantee” that if the system failed within 2 years and was not fixed within 24 hours we would be awarded. $1,000.  Our system failed within that time.  It happens on a Friday in March and we were without heat for 5 days.  The technician that initially came to asses it shrugged his shoulders and said “not my problem, talk to the office Monday”.  The system was replaced as the main unit failed.  I have since tried to contact them for the refund if $1,000 and they have completely ghosted me.  I sent emails, screen shots of the guarantee, and multiple phone calls which have all been completely ignored.  Their customer service is non-existent and you will just get a call centre every time.  Do NOT use this company, they just want your money.  DO NOT Recommend!  Next stop is the Better Business Bureau. As a result I have decided not to donate to ReStore, now or in the future. I believe in their mission and in fact I volunteered with them many years ago when they first came to Canada.

So impressed, this is my new go-to garage","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Denise Perrin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWoPTld2DhDIf4GN1x8GG6Rz-IXQj_W6o8vpk1uwvZ-PoUZybTR=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Best mechanic — and best hugs — ever!

We had our Range Rover serviced with Kicking Horse Automotive, and Gerry is such a fabulous person and amazing mechanic. A few weeks ago, my husband suffered a massive stroke, and just when we thought things were settling, he had to be rushed to the Duncan hospital to have his gallbladder removed.

On my way down to be with him, my front end started making horrible screeching noises — I was terrified something major was wrong. I stopped in at Kicking Horse Automotive, and Gerry immediately took the time to help. He drove the vehicle, checked the wheels, and a tiny stone fell out — that was the noise!

He could tell I was upset about everything going on with my husband and gave me the most sincere, comforting hug. It was exactly what I needed in that moment.

Gerry isn’t just a great mechanic — he’s a genuinely kind human being. Thank you, Gerry and Kicking Horse Automotive, for caring about people as much as you care about cars! ❤️","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"ken deagle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVHbo3umwFI6t-IlWMwDC4DLLJp8xJtToM24Kv0b0UXkYgY-G0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Today, I panicked when I found a check engine light on in my 2018 Toyota Corolla.
